intro: As a sinister force threatens the food production plant, Lieutenant Tatsunami Hibiki and the Wardog Squadron are thrust into a brutal war between fellow humans.
description:
◇ ‘What is “Muv-Luv Unlimited: The Day After”?’
A spin-off title of the Muv-Luv series, continuing from “Muv-Luv” and “Muv-Luv Alternative”.
The third title in a spin-off series derived from “Muv-Luv Unlimited”, which branches into a different future from the anime-adapted “Muv-Luv Alternative.”
After protagonist Shirogane Takeru sees the heroine escape Earth in “Muv-Luv Unlimited”, this story portrays the people left behind on Earth who nonetheless keep battling against their fate of extinction.

◇ Story
To solve the food crisis that had worsened Seattle’s public order, the Empire began construction of a food production plant.
However, on its first day of operation, the facility was taken over by unknown forces, and Supreme Commander Koubuin Yuuhi went missing.
To rescue the Commander and neutralize the terrorists, Hibiki’s War Dog Squad launched an assault on the plant, now turned into a battlefield.
